sections.paragraph:
Original: שׂבּכא סבּכא

Transliteration: sabbekâ' śabbekâ'

Phonetic: sab-bek-aw'

BDB Definition:

  1. trigon, musical instrument
    1. a triangular musical instrument with four strings, similar to a lyre

Origin: from a root corresponding to H5440

TWOT entry: 3003

Part(s) of speech: Noun Feminine
